text:

    www/chromium: attempt to make it work with Microsoft Teams

    - add dependency virtual_oss so the microphone works [1]
    - skip assertion in h264_decoder, we will force it to initialize
      later [2]

    PR:     246214 [1]
    PR:     255484 [2]
    MFH:    2021Q2
